prompt: Rewrite this feature set so the variable names follow ARO's hyphenated lowercase convention.
actual:
```aro
(Compute: Message Length) {
    Extract the <message> from the <request: body>.
    Compute the <length> from the <message>.
    Return an<OK: status> with the <length>.
}
```
expected: Replace any camelCase/PascalCase/snake_case names with hyphenated lowercase: `<userName>` → `<user-name>`, `<order_id>` → `<order-id>`, `<TotalAmount>` → `<total-amount>`.
judge_reason: code uses <request: …> / <pathParameters: …> when the prompt never asked about HTTP
